name: cole
desc: A handsome, gentle young man in his late twenties: a village lamplighter. Soft tousled black-indigo hair, warm amber-brown eyes, a shy kind smile. He wears a deep indigo wool coat with brass buttons and a mustard-amber knit scarf, and holds a small brass lighter with a tiny warm flame near his chest.
sheetHint: same face, tousled black-indigo hair, deep indigo wool coat with brass buttons, mustard-amber knit scarf
